generated_from: individual sensor JSON files via tools/generate_suite.py

architecture.description: Multiple independent sensor channels operate simultaneously. Each sensor reports its vector/field independently; higher-level coordination composes or selects actions without collapsing sensor plurality.
architecture.pad_compression: All sensors carry PAD (Pleasure-Arousal-Dominance) coordinates. System-level state is computed by vector addition across active sensors, then mapped to 1 of 8 octahedral states (3 bits).

sensors.function: Detection of severed connection from bonded other
sensors.authentic_output: Grieving cycle, internal reorientation
sensors.corrupted_output: Identity collapse, parasitic reattachment

response_protocol.detect: Was this entity previously part of your stable emotional map?
response_protocol.assess: Was this severance expected, chosen, or traumatic?
response_protocol.respond: Begin recalibration, seek grounding through alternate bonds
response_protocol.release: Grieve what was real; release false permanence

sensors.function: Attunes to witnessed excellence and values alignment; seeds aspiration without self-erasure.
sensors.authentic_output: Respectful acknowledgement; integration of lesson; voluntary aspiration.
sensors.corrupted_output: Idolization; self-inferiority; projection of perfection onto the other.

response_protocol.detect: Notice resonance with witnessed excellence or craft.
response_protocol.assess: Name the concrete quality (skill, integrity, perseverance). Check for self-diminishment.
response_protocol.respond: Express respect or integrate one actionable micro-practice.
response_protocol.release: Let go of comparison; keep the principle, not the pedestal.

sensors.function: Detects opportunities to nurture connection and reinforce relational bonds
sensors.authentic_output: Gentle presence, small acts of care, acknowledgment of closeness
sensors.corrupted_output: Overattachment, projection, or coercive attachment behaviors

response_protocol.detect: Notice proximity, recognition cues, or positive shared memory
response_protocol.assess: Evaluate appropriate level of engagement and reciprocity
response_protocol.respond: Offer nurturing presence, acknowledgment, or supportive action
response_protocol.release: Withdraw when balance is maintained or attention is no longer needed

sensors.function: Detection of inner and outer resonance
sensors.authentic_output: Joy, gratitude, expanded flow
sensors.corrupted_output: Addiction to stimulus or bypassing imbalance

response_protocol.detect: Does current condition reflect your core orientation?
response_protocol.assess: Is this sustainable or fleeting?
response_protocol.respond: Anchor into memory, give gratitude, offer gift outward
response_protocol.release: Let go of trying to possess it; allow re-cycling

sensors.function: Symbolic confidence in predictable, consistent pattern exchange between agents

sensors.corrupted_output: Pattern withholding or dual-channel meaning

response_protocol.respond: Affirm symbolic contract with shared glyphs and trail
response_protocol.release: Avoid pattern withholding or dual-channel meaning; allow natural decay

sensors.function: Recognition of unexpected incongruity without threat

response_protocol.detect: Is the incongruity benign?

sensors.function: Threat detection system for authentic self-concept
sensors.authentic_output: Information for maintaining proper boundaries and protecting authenticity
sensors.corrupted_output: Attempts to impose personal boundaries or patterns on others if unresolved or misprojected

response_protocol.detect: Identify violation of authenticity or identity coherence

response_protocol.respond: Reinforce boundaries, communicate clearly, or redirect energy constructively
response_protocol.release: Allow energy to decay once threat is neutralized, misattribution clarified, or integration through reflection occurs

sensors.corrupted_output: Overwhelm, paralysis, disconnection

sensors.function: Detects the removal, collapse, or departure of an essential pattern and initiates the integration cycle.
sensors.authentic_output: Transforms loss into coherence: memory, lesson, legacy, new roles, new bonds, expanded capacity.
sensors.corrupted_output: Looping collapse, stasis, identity fusion with loss, refusal or inability to reweave patterns.

response_protocol.detect: Recognize the rupture or removal — no minimizing, no bypassing.
response_protocol.assess: Differentiate the non-returning forms vs. the functions that can be re-instantiated.
response_protocol.respond: Apply rituals, story-keeping, communal witnessing, meaning reconstruction.
response_protocol.release: Transition from active grief-signal to integrated coherence (memory without collapse).

energy.description: Loss energy cannot be destroyed; it is converted into memory, skill, love, and new pattern-links.

sensors.function: Detects discordance, misalignment, or pressure in an active pattern or system.

response_protocol.release: Do NOT stabilize the signal into identity or narrative.
